app.name: RayFlow
app.legal: The user is solely responsible for complying with the laws of their country.

client.title: VLESS Client
client.subtitle: Choose a profile, press connect, and keep external Windows proxy state visible.

modeHints.local_proxy: Only apps configured manually for this proxy will use RayFlow. Windows proxy is not changed.
modeHints.system_proxy: RayFlow temporarily replaces Windows proxy settings and restores them on disconnect.
modeHints.tun: Routes traffic through sing-box TUN. Requires administrator privileges.

client.externalProxyWarning: External Windows proxy is active and will be restored after RayFlow disconnects.
client.systemProxyWarning: RayFlow will temporarily replace Windows proxy settings.
client.tunWarning: TUN requires administrator privileges and sing-box.

ipCheck.title: IP Check
ipCheck.subtitle: Check where traffic exits without leaving the app.
ipCheck.tunUnavailable: TUN needs sing-box, enabled settings and admin privileges.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.empty: Import a VLESS profile to begin.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: HTTP/HTTPS subscriptions can contain VLESS links.
subscriptions.masked: URLs are masked in the UI and logs.

import.title: Import VLESS Link
import.description: Reality, TCP, WS, gRPC and XHTTP params are normalized by the backend.

zapret.title: Zapret
zapret.subtitle: Flowseal presets, explicit start/stop actions and readable process logs.
zapret.presetsDescription: Zapret presets are started only after explicit user action.
zapret.empty: Update presets to add starter entries.

routing.title: Routing
routing.subtitle: Domain rules for future Hybrid and Smart routing decisions.
routing.description: Domain-level routing for Hybrid and Smart modes.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Find whether the failure is DNS, TCP, HTTP, core config or route selection.
diagnostics.panelDescription: DNS, TCP and HTTP checks with persistent history.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Local API, language, theme, core paths and safety defaults.
settings.autostartDescription: Start RayFlow with the system later via Tauri integration.
settings.coreDescription: RayFlow does not bundle cores in the MVP. Configure absolute binary paths explicitly.
settings.tunDescription: TUN is a full-system route powered by sing-box and requires administrator privileges.
